nodes.speaker: Marlo
lines: You absolute lunatic. Hold it over the panel — starboard side — and DON'T drift.

nodes.speaker: Marlo
lines: Systems waking. Oh, that's warm. That's — okay. Okay.
Six hours I've been sitting in the dark out here, and you know the worst part? It wasn't the cold.

responses.buttonText: Save it for the Abode. Can you fly?

nodes.speaker: Marlo
lines: The Pupil. You can't see it from inside the cone — no light, right? Can't see anything.
But you can feel where it is. Six hours, and I could have pointed to it with my eyes shut the whole time.
Don't tell the boss. She'll make me take the long way forever.

nodes.speaker: Marlo
lines: I can fly. I can always fly — it's the stopping that got complicated.
I owe you my heartbeat, stranger. When you need something moved quiet, no questions, no manifest — the name's Marlo. Remember it.
